notes: Validation export, label-sheet, merge, frame evaluation, clinical-scale agreement evaluation, threshold calibration, and model-readiness report tooling are implemented.
No clinician-reviewed validation dataset is committed in this repository.

House-Brackmann, Sunnybrook, and eFACE-style estimates remain Mirror estimates until reviewed assessment labels from current v5 estimates with at least 80% usable movement coverage, complete scale-specific input provenance for counted primary-scale comparisons, complete resting-metric provenance, no inferred House-Brackmann eye-closure input, pseudonymous reviewer identity controls, and at least 10 distinct pseudonymous validation cases meet the documented 80% observed agreement, 80% Wilson lower-bound agreement, and House-Brackmann case-mix standard.
Primary clinical-scale target assignment should use the blinded label sheet workflow in docs/clinical-scale-review-protocol.md.

Clinical-facing clinical-scale support also requires a passed clinical review package verification report listed in clinicalScaleReviewPackageVerificationReports, and each enabled per-scale availability entry must repeat the matching sourceDatasetSha256 and clinicalReviewPackageVerificationReport path.

Production threshold constants should not be changed from schema-v1 calibration reports until reviewed datasets are available, and calibrated status must list thresholdCalibrationSourceDatasetSha256s matching the referenced threshold calibration reports.
